hotels.name: Rameez Zostel
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Rameez Zostel comprend des hébergements à Puttalam. Vous profiterez d'une cuisine commune et d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l'ensemble des locaux.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international Bandaranaike) est à 101 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Rameez Zostel in Puttalam offers a hostel experience with free WiFi and a shared kitchen. Guests can enjoy air-conditioning, spa baths, and private bathrooms.
Modern Amenities: Each room features a bath or shower, tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, work desk, and TV. Additional amenities include a microwave, electric kettle, and wardrobe.
Convenient Location: Located 101 km from Bandaranaike International Airport, the hostel provides free on-site parking. Reception staff speak English.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Rameez Zostel ofrece alojamiento en Puttalam. El alojamiento dispone de cocina compartida y wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Bandaranayake) está a 101 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Rameez Zostel fornece acomodações em Puttalam. O alojamento apresenta uma cozinha partilhada e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade.

O Aeroporto Internacional de Bandaranaike fica a 101 km da propriedade.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Rameez Zostel prevede alloggi a Puttalam. L'alloggio propone una cucina in comune e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura.

Aeroporto Internazionale di Colombo Bandaranaike si trova a 101 km dalla struttura.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Bar Reef Resort
hotels.description_fr:
We are thrilled to announce that Bar Reef Resort will officially reopen its doors on 01st December 2025!
After a period of rest and rejuvenation, we are ready to welcome you back to the natural beauty, tranquility, and unmatched hospitality that you know and love. Whether you're returning for the serenity of our beachfront villas or discovering us for the first time, we can't wait to share the magic of Bar Reef with you once again.
📅 Bookings open soon – stay tuned for special reopening offers and updates!
Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to seeing you in paradise.
Stretched over 2 km of private sandy beach, Bar Reef Resort in Kalpitiya offers rustic yet charming accommodation surrounded by landscaped gardens.

hotels.name: Just Inn
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Just Inn vous accueille à Puttalam. Vous bénéficierez d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et d’un parking privé disponible sur place.

Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont à votre disposition.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international Bandaranaike) est à 101 km.

Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,1 pour un séjour à deux.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Just Inn in Puttalam offers a homestay experience with free WiFi and private bathrooms. Each room includes a work desk, electric kettle, and free toiletries.
Convenient Facilities: Guests benefit from free on-site private parking, a private entrance, and a shower. The property ensures a pleasant and comfortable stay.
Accessible Location: Located 101 km from Bandaranaike International Airport, Just Inn provides easy access to local attractions.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.1 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Just Inn está en Puttalam. Hay wifi gratis y parking privado en el propio alojamiento.

Hay toallas y ropa de cama en la habitación en casa particular.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Bandaranayake) está a 101 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,1 para viajes de dos personas.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Just Inn encontra-se em Puttalam. Os hóspedes beneficiam de acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e estacionamento privado disponível no local.

Toalhas e roupa de cama são providenciadas neste quarto em acomodação particular.

O Aeroporto Internacional de Bandaranaike fica a 101 km da propriedade.

Os casais gostam particularmente da localização – deram uma pontuação de 9,1 para uma viagem a dois.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Just Inn si trova a Puttalam. Potrete approfittare del WiFi gratis e di un parcheggio privato disponibile sul posto.

Presso questo alloggio in famiglia troverete asciugamani e lenzuola tra i servizi offerti.

Aeroporto Internazionale di Colombo Bandaranaike si trova a 101 km dalla struttura.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,1 per un viaggio a due.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap
